title: FinalDocumentV1
description: Final formatted document produced by the Document Formatter agent. The reconstruct_document post-tool appends document_text from the sections array.

sections.description: Ordered list of final document sections.

summary_of_changes.description: High-level description of all changes made across the document.

document_text.description: Full reconstructed document as a single string. Populated by the reconstruct_document post-tool.

section_count.description: Number of sections in the reconstructed document. Populated by the reconstruct_document post-tool.
